name: logcat_car_media_snapshot
description: Non-streaming logcat dump (-d) for Media3 / car tags, written to artifacts/logcat/ and tail printed for LLM context.

tags.description: Space-separated TAG:V entries (logcat -s). Default: MediaLibrary:V MediaSession:V AndroidAuto:V ExoPlayer:V

out_file.description: Optional full path for the full dump (env OUT_FILE in script)
